name: R5RangeElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Range to FHIR R4 Range
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Range to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Range.low` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Range.low` as `Equivalent`.
If the low element is missing, the low boundary is not known.

Element `Range.low` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Range.low` as `Equivalent`.
If the low element is missing, the low boundary is not known.

Element `Range.high` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Range.high` as `Equivalent`.
If the high element is missing, the high boundary is not known.

Element `Range.high` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Range.high` as `Equivalent`.
If the high element is missing, the high boundary is not known.
